features: Dove Nutritive Solutions Daily Moisture Conditioner helps you achieve manageable and silky hair that feels beautifully soft
Dove Daily Moisture Conditioner has been designed to smooth and progressively nourish dry hair, helping to protect it from daily wear and tear
This conditioner has been formulated with Pro-Moisture Complex, which nourishes hair from deep within
Wash after wash, this conditioner makes hair more healthy looking and with continuous use, 10x more resilient to daily damage*
This conditioner for dry hair is suitable for daily use, so your hair is smooth, soft and manageable every day
For best results, use with Dove Daily Moisture Shampoo to visibly strengthen and nourish your hair
description: Product Description Daily styling and sun exposure are just some of the factors that contribute to everyday wear and tear on our hair. But getting silky hair doesn’t have to be difficult: with Dove Nutritive Solutions Daily Moisture Conditioner, you can help protect and moisturise your hair to keep it feeling softer and smoother while making it easier to manage every day. This conditioner for dry hair contains Pro-Moisture Complex, which progressively nourishes from within the strand, making hair up to 10x more resilient to daily damage from grooming and brushing**. How to use: gently apply Dove Daily Moisture Conditioner to wet hair after shampooing, focusing on mid-lengths to tips. Leave on for a minute, then rinse. Suitable for daily use. For silky-soft results, day after day, make sure you use a shampoo that works with your conditioner to increase your hair’s resilience. Dove Daily Moisture Shampoo will help prevent daily damage, leaving your hair looking and feeling instantly nourished and beautiful. Dove believes no young person should be held back from reaching their full potential. Since 2004, Dove has been building self-esteem and confidence in young people – and by 2030, they’ll have helped ¼ billion young people through their educational programmes and resources. *10x less breakage when combing vs non-conditioning shampoo **Breakage data using Daily Moisture Shampoo and Conditioner vs non-conditioning shampoo Ingredients Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Dimethicone, Stearamidopropyl Dimethylamine, Parfum, Behentrimonium Chloride, Lactic Acid, Dipropylene Glycol, 1,2-hexanediol, Benzyl Alcohol, Sodium Chloride, Amodimethicone, Disodium Edta, Glycerin, Gluconolactone, Trehalose, Phenoxyethanol, Cetrimonium Chloride, Peg-7 Propylheptyl Ether, Arginine, Lysine Hcl, Sodium Sulfate, Alpha-isomethyl Ionone, Hexyl Cinnamal, Hydroxycitronellal, Linalool, Ci 15985, Ci 19140 Directions Wet your hair thoroughly, Apply Dove Daily Moisture Conditioner to wet after shampooing, focusing on mid-lengths tips, Leave for a minute, then rinse. Suitable daily use. Safety Warning Caution: use only as directed. Avoid contact with eyes. If eye contact occurs wash out immediately with warm water. If irritation occurs discontinue use. As we are always looking to improve our products, our formulations change from time to time, so please always check the product packaging before useavoid contact with eyes. In case of contact with eyes, rinse thoroughly with water. See more
